changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `tenants` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `slug` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`status` between 0 and 1), PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), UNIQUE KEY `UKkn82rs0p55luybrg4n7x7di8` (`slug`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `punishment_templates` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `reason` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `type` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`type` between 0 and 2), PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDXfb0n1048swedl734iua11xgh6` (`identifier`), KEY `IDX6sna77t8blfhbf7vw1d949qv7` (`tenant_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `punishments` ( `identifier` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `scope` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `source` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `type` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`type` between 0 and 2), `template_identifier` uuid DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDXbg1863u12hbsiqggy1kxv84gj` (`identifier`), KEY `IDXf248pwm8h4gskq8r86ohne5bd` (`tenant_id`), KEY `FKsystxtartkbg3pelwij5y444y` (`template_identifier`), CONSTRAINT `FKsystxtartkbg3pelwij5y444y` FOREIGN KEY (`template_identifier`) REFERENCES `punishment_templates` (`identifier`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `punishment_profiles` ( `owner` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `active_ban_identifier` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `active_chat_ban_identifier` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`owner`,`tenant_id`), UNIQUE KEY `UKjenhq1urh55q6qbhxbor43mpr` (`active_ban_identifier`), UNIQUE KEY `UK3bfpsh5gh8uybcnqn6ist0ju3` (`active_chat_ban_identifier`), KEY `IDXs2rqilyfwjja2eh18bvdkgssg` (`owner`), CONSTRAINT `FK44vycpq38twfwo4pm864edwtf` FOREIGN KEY (`active_chat_ban_identifier`) REFERENCES `punishments` (`identifier`), CONSTRAINT `FKrg26gk6cng7up213jiux4ugap` FOREIGN KEY (`active_ban_identifier`) REFERENCES `punishments` (`identifier`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `punishment_profiles_punishments` ( `punishment_profile_entity_owner` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `punishment_profile_entity_tenant_id` uuid NOT NULL, `history_identifier` varchar(255) NOT NULL, UNIQUE KEY `UK72hdqv4fhab29f7yg9a80d1nt` (`history_identifier`), KEY `FKrwhtrufbtcfrxgociysp1d1iw` (`punishment_profile_entity_owner`,`punishment_profile_entity_tenant_id`), CONSTRAINT `FK7yf2av2hp2nfq84philn3588l` FOREIGN KEY (`history_identifier`) REFERENCES `punishments` (`identifier`), CONSTRAINT `FKrwhtrufbtcfrxgociysp1d1iw` FOREIGN KEY (`punishment_profile_entity_owner`, `punishment_profile_entity_tenant_id`) REFERENCES `punishment_profiles` (`owner`, `tenant_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `punishment_evidence` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `captured_content_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `evidence_type` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`evidence_type` between 0 and 3), `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `reference_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `retention_expires_at` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `punishment_identifier` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDXeowdvehtn2mq9ratnjjt10mx0` (`identifier`), KEY `IDX88plc6lylknnkler3ds0vmagv` (`tenant_id`), KEY `FK1fcfw3b9ah8l5ywj1ksemk98r` (`punishment_identifier`), CONSTRAINT `FK1fcfw3b9ah8l5ywj1ksemk98r` FOREIGN KEY (`punishment_identifier`) REFERENCES `punishments` (`identifier`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `reports` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `category` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`category` between 0 and 3), `created_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `description` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `reported_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `reporter_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `resolution_note` varchar(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `resolved_by` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`status` between 0 and 3), `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `updated_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDXcdecaabcx0057rmwougq4lln8` (`identifier`), KEY `IDXp2ffpn85f33jnlh9a6dw6dfjd` (`tenant_id`), KEY `IDXhucb8heess4o7s9d641njq2e0` (`reporter_hash`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `connector_registrations` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `oauth2_client_id` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `oauth2_client_secret_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`status` between 0 and 1), `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), UNIQUE KEY `UKhb72u55ks7duissu086wfgjd4` (`oauth2_client_id`), KEY `IDXp64mq4clkp3b1d9c6jmo06021` (`identifier`), KEY `IDXhwsvcq9wogcnjafm8qmil9niy` (`tenant_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `event_subscriptions` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `active` bit(1) NOT NULL, `delivery_url` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `failure_count` int(11) NOT NULL, `last_attempt_at` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL, `last_success_at` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `signing_secret` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `connector_identifier` uuid DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDX4ja81yhw8rl240tcyebtjgvx4` (`identifier`), KEY `FKsp913s457jgefhadxb9p06qyo` (`connector_identifier`), CONSTRAINT `FKsp913s457jgefhadxb9p06qyo` FOREIGN KEY (`connector_identifier`) REFERENCES `connector_registrations` (`identifier`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `elo_profiles` ( `owner` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid NOT NULL, `chat_elo` int(11) NOT NULL, `chat_elo_updated_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `gameplay_elo` int(11) NOT NULL, `gameplay_elo_updated_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), PRIMARY KEY (`owner`,`tenant_id`), KEY `IDX5k6jltfkea67v5ai92cey03u7` (`owner`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `elo_events` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `created_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `delta` int(11) NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `owner` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `reason_code` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`reason_code` between 0 and 5), `resulting_score` int(11) NOT NULL, `source_evidence_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `track` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`track` between 0 and 1), PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDX1vli9egxhskmxh09x7ippe01p` (`identifier`), KEY `IDXbi03h5v8mngaibmc7f6eo81s3` (`tenant_id`), KEY `IDX8kfktno2r37fryp23hbrywxge` (`owner`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `appeals` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `appellant_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `decided_by` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `decision_note` varchar(2000) DEFAULT NULL, `eligibility_check_result` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`eligibility_check_result`)), `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `statement` varchar(2000) DEFAULT NULL, `status` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`status` between 0 and 6), `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `updated_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `punishment_identifier` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDXkumdsu9qt44a38mg4k9ngyp87` (`identifier`), KEY `IDX7yn6lv2wptlia206ij210jtig` (`tenant_id`), KEY `IDX9faypy3gxh4xmiqii41ypsj5k` (`appellant_hash`), KEY `FKqb76lk2ldlufmeevnpme8l94m` (`punishment_identifier`), CONSTRAINT `FKqb76lk2ldlufmeevnpme8l94m` FOREIGN KEY (`punishment_identifier`) REFERENCES `punishments` (`identifier`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.comment: Ban-evasion detection via hashed IP correlation
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `ip_correlation_tokens` ( `identifier` uuid NOT NULL, `first_seen` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `last_seen` bigint(20) NOT NULL, `meta_data` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin DEFAULT NULL CHECK (json_valid(`meta_data`)), `occurrence_count` int(11) NOT NULL, `owner_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, `tenant_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `token` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`identifier`), KEY `IDXej580909u0b2cronpaairkgty` (`identifier`), KEY `IDXb4n6xf0005sm3973m6oyxrw1t` (`tenant_id`), KEY `IDXdchy5i8x4p42k38necseou23o` (`token`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE `tenant_elo_settings` ( `tenant_id` uuid NOT NULL, `base_elo_chat` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `base_elo_gameplay` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `perma_ban_template_chat_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `perma_ban_template_gameplay_id` uuid DEFAULT NULL, `perma_ban_threshold_chat` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `perma_ban_threshold_gameplay` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, `report_reward_delta` int(11) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`tenant_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_uca1400_ai_ci;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.comment: eloDelta on a punishment template: applied to the offender's Elo whenever the template is used, regardless of who/what applied it (see PunishmentApplicationService.apply). 0 (the default) means "no Elo effect" - every pre-existing template keeps its current behavior.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `punishment_templates` ADD COLUMN `elo_delta` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

changeSet.author: blackhole
changeSet.comment: EloReasonCode gained PUNISHMENT_APPLIED (6) and REPORT_REWARDED (7); the ordinal-backed reason_code CHECK constraint must widen to admit them. This is hand-written raw SQL because MariaDB requires MODIFY COLUMN to redefine a column-level inline CHECK (DROP CONSTRAINT/DROP CHECK by the auto-generated name is rejected) - there is no native Liquibase changeType for this, and none should be attempted.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `elo_events` MODIFY COLUMN `reason_code` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`reason_code` between 0 and 7);

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE `elo_events` MODIFY COLUMN `reason_code` tinyint(4) DEFAULT NULL CHECK (`reason_code` between 0 and 5);
